channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Outside no.16 Mikton Rd, 1st March
item.description:
Street light out for about a month ?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Milton Road, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti in red marker on pillar, 1st March
item.description:
This graffiti marking has appeared overnight. A quick google suggests that this in relation to a political march. Please can this be removed ASAP. The location is on the corner of Norman Road and Tarves Way as seen in the photo.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Norman Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sharp metal in children’s play park, 1st March
item.description:
There is an old rusted bit of fence directly next to the caterpillar part of the children’s play park which is dangerous

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lewes Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Boxes electrical stuff, 1st March
item.description:
5th time of reporting! Been there since Xmas, which shows you how regularly Lambeth come around. Please remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 97, Durning Road, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 1st March
item.description:
Fly tipping outside our flat

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Foulden Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti sprayed on charity shop window at 406- 408 Brixton road SW9., 1st March
item.description:
I like to report graffiti sprayed on charity shop window at 406- 408 Brixton road SW9. The graffiti which is on both sides of the shop entrance is on the window so should easily clean off. The graffiti has been there for approximately two months.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 412, Brixton Road, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hole in street, 1st March
item.description:
Trip hazard hole in street. Repeated problem underlying issue is a defective drain/water issue leaching away the soil below. Corner of richmond ave and gainford street N1

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 78, Richmond Avenue, Barnsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter always overflowing on the street, 1st March
item.description:
The bins at 59 cranwich are constantly overflowing litter onto the street and now additionally big large bins (still Overflowing) have been placed in the sidewalk.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cranwich Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pot hole getting worse, 1st March
item.description:
Pot hole getting worse

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cornell Close, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle, 1st March
item.description:
Parked there for approximately 3 months Sticker on the windscreen regarding vehicle not taxed

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mosslea Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Traffic cones being used on road to prevent other resident parking, 1st March
item.description:
Constant use of 3 traffic cones to block other residents from using the parking space.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oak Road, Slade Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bin, rubbish strewn across pavement, 1st March
item.description:
The bin by the bus shelter is overflowing and there is rubbish across the pavement which could be a trip or slip hazard to pedestrians. Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beckenham Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Corner of Spurgeon and Deverell St, Traffic bell lifted off pavement, 1st March
item.description:
Looks like a big vehicle hit the traffic bell and has lifted the bell and part of the paving

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Deverell Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Br12ss, 1st March
item.description:
I live in Bromley, UK, and there's a dead rat on the sidewalk.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mornington Avenue, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Streets not been cleaned, 1st March
item.description:
Abandoned car Rubbish everywhere Leaves It’s really bad

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cotham Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street sign needs fixing, 1st March
item.description:
Please could this sign be straightened. Many thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 26, St Paul's Wood Hill, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter covering fenham street and marmont road, 1st March
item.description:
Please clean this all up

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Marmont Road, Peckham, Greater London

item.title: Purple graffiti on bus shelter, 1st March
item.description:
Please clean this all off

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hanover Park, Peckham, Greater London

item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (non-offensive)
